docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-17-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NICHOLSON, TODD RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEV CORP $12,500.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $12,500.00, DEFENDANT WAS PROPERLY SERVED; FAILED TO APPEAR STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
MOTION TO VACATE JUGEMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEV CORP HEARING SET FOR FEB-20-2026 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

MOTION TO VACATE JUGEMENT FILED BY IS GRANTED. CONTINUED TO APR-02-2026 AT 3:30 PM IN 506 FOR TRIAL. PLAINTIFF TODD NICHOLSON IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEV. CORP IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY FELICIA ROBINSON AND SHERINA MCCOY, PROPERTY MANAGEMENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: LAUREN KRAMER SUJUEETH; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
COPYING FEES (48 PAGE) REQUESTED 2 SETS OF THE ENTIRE CASE, FROM 10/31/2025 TO 04/02/2026 PAID BY PLAINTIFF NICHOLSON, TODD
ORDER GRANTING MOTION TO VACATE WITH A CONTINUANCE.

ORDER TO DISMISS WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF.
STIPULATION TO ALLOW THE CASE TO BE HEARD BY A JUDGE PRO TEM. FILED BY TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEV CORP

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF TODD NICHOLSON IS NOT PRESENT. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT TENDERLOIN NEIGHTBORHOOD DEV CORP REPRESENTED BY FELICIA ROBINSON, PROPERTY MANAGER; SHERINA MCCOY GENERAL MANAGER, ABRAHAM RELAYO, MAINTENANCE III. JUDGE PRO TEM: ELAN CONSUELLA LAMBERT; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
